In order to tell the main story as well as possible with limited resources, dev decided to bring more awakers in V2.2+. So starting from V2.2, the release interval of new main story chapter for Arc [Star Alignment Moment] will be adjusted from the previously announced 2 months to 3 months.

What does it mean? The schedule for new awakers will be changed into this:

V2.1: Only GDoll.

V2.2: Clementine + 2 new awakers.

V2.3: Doresain + 2 new awakers.

V2.4: GMurphy + 2 new awakers.

V2.5: Caraboo + 2 new awakers.

V2.6: Arachne + 2 new awakers.

V2.7: GTulu + 2 new awakers.
